channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-13
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 2 INTERESTING, 5 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Tue 2026-07-07: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.1 ft @ 5.8 sec, wind 9 kt NNE, water 69°F. Low tide: 06:40, 19:31. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.1 ft); period too short (5.8 sec); wind direction off (NNE). Wed 2026-07-08: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.7 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 4 kt NNW, water 69°F. Low tide: 07:37, 20:45. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.7 ft); period too short (5.5 sec); wind direction off (NNW). Thu 2026-07-09: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 08:00, 2.4 ft @ 7.0 sec, wind 5 kt SW, water 70°F. Low tide: 08:40, 21:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Fri 2026-07-10: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 08:00, 2.4 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 4 kt W, water 70°F. Low tide: 09:43, 22:54. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Sat 2026-07-11: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.3 sec, wind 5 kt N, water 72°F. Low tide: 10:45, 23:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (N). Sun 2026-07-12: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 5.3 sec, wind 4 kt S, water 72°F. Low tide: 11:45. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.3 sec); wind direction off (S). Mon 2026-07-13: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.3 ft @ 8.0 sec, wind 7 kt E, water 72°F. Low tide: 00:49, 12:44. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (E).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 2 INTERESTING, 5 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Tue 2026-07-07: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.1 ft @ 5.8 sec, wind 9 kt NNE, water 69°F. Low tide: 06:40, 19:31. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.1 ft); period too short (5.8 sec); wind direction off (NNE).
  • Wed 2026-07-08: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.7 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 4 kt NNW, water 69°F. Low tide: 07:37, 20:45. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.7 ft); period too short (5.5 sec); wind direction off (NNW).
  • Thu 2026-07-09: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 08:00, 2.4 ft @ 7.0 sec, wind 5 kt SW, water 70°F. Low tide: 08:40, 21:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Fri 2026-07-10: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 08:00, 2.4 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 4 kt W, water 70°F. Low tide: 09:43, 22:54. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Sat 2026-07-11: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 6.3 sec, wind 5 kt N, water 72°F. Low tide: 10:45, 23:52. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (N).
  • Sun 2026-07-12: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.2 ft @ 5.3 sec, wind 4 kt S, water 72°F. Low tide: 11:45. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.3 sec); wind direction off (S).
  • Mon 2026-07-13: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.3 ft @ 8.0 sec, wind 7 kt E, water 72°F. Low tide: 00:49, 12:44. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wind direction off (E).
